welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.subtitle: Your HODLY account is almost ready.
welcome.text-1: We just need to verify your e-mail address and you’re good to go.

password.title: Welcome!
password.subtitle: Someone has requested to restore the password to your HODLY account.
password.text-1: If this was you, you can set a new password by clicking on the button below:
password.text-2: If you don't want to change your password or didn't request this, just ignore and delete this message.

email.title: Hey there!
email.subtitle: Either you or someone else has requested to change the e-mail address for your HODLY account.
email.text-1: To change the e-mail address, click below
email.text-2: If you don't want to change your e-mail address or you didn't request this, just ignore this and delete the message.

auto: This letter was generated and sent automatically and does not require any response.
